verses.2: Let my sentence come out of your presence.
verses.4: As for the deeds of men, by the word of your lips,
verses.5: My steps have held fast to your paths.
verses.6: I have called on you, for you will answer me, God.
verses.8: Keep me as the apple of your eye.
verses.9: from the wicked who oppress me,
verses.10: They close up their callous hearts.
verses.11: They have now surrounded us in our steps.
verses.12: He is like a lion that is greedy of his prey,
verses.14: from men by your hand, LORD,
verses.15: As for me, I shall see your face in righteousness.
